title: Farting and Pooping
description: A great mod that lets you fart.
body:
![Farting and Pooping Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb89c99acb40c0abd314132608bcf9c339a8bf86.png)

![Farting and Pooping Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a34abf863693ba325c7d0e6e06f544cbfcbfcb91_0.webp)

You must download the GeckoLib mod, otherwise the game will not open and give an error.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/62Y7az0wT58" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Press R to fart.

Blocks:
-Poop

Mobs:
-Poop Boss

Commands:
/fartmod fart set <player> <fart_level>
/fartmod fart get <player>
/fartmod fart <player>
